items.claim: Conor McGregor has been out of the octagon for 5 years.
items.quote: But after 5 years out of the octagon

items.claim: Conor McGregor suffered a snapped leg injury.
Conor McGregor has not won a fight since January 2020.
Conor McGregor's only win in the last decade was against Donald Cerrone.
items.quote: He beat Cerrone in 40 seconds. That's it. That is his whole resume for basically the last decade.

items.claim: Extended layoffs cause a loss of timing, reflexes, and instinctive counter-striking ability.
items.quote: You lose the timing, the reflexes, that thing where you eat a shot and fire back without even thinking about it.

items.claim: Stipe Miocic looked slow and flat after a 4-year layoff.
items.quote: He finally comes back at 42 to fight Jon Jones and he looks like a completely different person in there. Slow, flat
